items.name: Teriyaki Beef Sub
items.description: Subs - A fresh and toasted baguette with mayonnaise and cheese. All subs include the following toppings: cucumber, cilantro, white onion, pickled carrot, hot pepper, hot sauce, and sweet soy sauce.
items.simplified_description: Toasted baguette with teriyaki beef, mayo, cheese, and fresh vegetable toppings.

items.name: Grilled Bowl
